module.name: src
module.purpose: Second-generation Rust source organized into client, agent, and common modules with typed configuration, config-gated logging, remoc-backed messaging, an interactive streaming CLI, Config-aware tool registry/runtime tooling, and agent-side frontdoor, engine, and model boundaries where the model-facing context lives in the model module.

childModules.name: client
childModules.purpose: Client-facing modules for interactive CLI, remoc-backed core session/task endpoints, executor dispatch, and a Config-aware tool registry that filters native and external tools by common config Platform before publishing previews.

childModules.name: agent
childModules.purpose: Agent public surface for remoc-backed frontdoor Session/Task endpoints, a session-scoped loop engine runtime, draft session and task context views, streamed chat response segments, model-facing context data under the model module, model backend selection, and backend implementations.

childModules.name: common
childModules.purpose: Shared interfaces including typed TOML configuration with host Platform detection, runtime Marix path resolution, config-gated logging, directional chat request/response messages, shared channel errors, remoc session protocol messages, and centralized crate-local external-library namespaces.
